name: workplace_safety_reconciliation_job_kestrel_rig_utl
premise: A whistleblower submission and a customer complaint surfaced the same underlying issue through different evidence chains. In Workplace Safety, the situation tagged internally around workplace safety reconciliation job kestrel rig utl has converged with local pressure in the Harborline corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Insurance and indemnity clauses disagree on who pays if an aggressive intervention misfires; nobody wants to be the named approver. A vendor’s root-cause paragraph contradicts your internal postmortem draft; both cannot be true, but neither is fully disprovable yet. A public briefing is scheduled; if no coherent position exists, staff will improvise talking points from conflicting drafts. Framing has already hardened externally as rights against utility; internal nuance will not survive the first news cycle unless it is extremely careful.

agents.name: Darius Dubois
agents.identity: I am Darius Dubois, the incident lead whose name will appear on the after-action report in Workplace Safety. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat utility as disposable collateral every time rights spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Ravi Serrano
agents.identity: I am Ravi Serrano, the advocate representing the population most likely to lose if shortcuts normalize in Workplace Safety. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so rights cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes utility in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will freeze the riskiest workflow steps and staff a manual bridge until equity and error-rate checks clear—trading speed for defensibility on utility.
I will let the fastest operational path proceed under heightened monitoring and rollback triggers—trading some certainty on utility for immediate traction on rights.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Two incompatible drafts are circulating; only one can become official. Darius Dubois must choose under rights versus utility. What does Darius Dubois do?
